tableau_dashboards.name: Segurança Pública
tableau_dashboards.notes: Select municipality, then 'Segurança Pública' tab. Data is rendered via Tableau Public embed. Export as CSV/Excel from within Tableau controls.

manual_steps: 2. Select a municipality from the dropdown
4. In the Tableau embed, click the download icon (bottom-right)
5. Choose 'Crosstab' or 'Data' to export as CSV
7. Repeat for each municipality of interest (or use AISP groupings)
alternative: For bulk data, prefer Strategy 1 (basedosdados) or Strategy 2 (BDEweb). The Caderno is best for spot checks.
